sentences.arabic: فَقَدْتُ حَقِيبَةً صَغِيرَةً فِي الْمَطَارِ وَشَعَرْتُ بِالْقَلَقِ.
sentences.translation: Izgubio sam malu torbu na aerodromu i osjećao sam uznemirenost.
sentences.translationEn: I lost a small bag at the airport and felt anxious.

sentences.arabic: ذَهَبْتُ فَوْرًا إِلَى مَكْتَبِ الأَمَانَاتِ الضَّائِعَةِ وَأَخْبَرْتُهُمْ بِالأَمْرِ.
sentences.translation: Odmah sam otišao u ured za izgubljene predmete i obavijestio ih.
sentences.translationEn: I went straight to the lost property office and reported it.

sentences.arabic: طَلَبُوا مِنِّي وَصْفَ الْحَقِيبَةِ وَلَوْنِهَا وَمَحْتَوَيَاتِهَا.
sentences.translation: Zamolili su me da opišem torbu, njenu boju i sadržaj.
sentences.translationEn: They asked me to describe the bag, its colour, and its contents.

sentences.arabic: بَعْدَ نِصْفِ سَاعَةٍ وَجَدُوا الْحَقِيبَةَ وَأَعَادُوهَا إِلَيَّ.
sentences.translation: Nakon pola sata pronašli su torbu i vratili mi je.
sentences.translationEn: After half an hour they found the bag and returned it to me.

sentences.translation: Osjećao sam veliko olakšanje i zahvalio se osoblju.
sentences.translationEn: I felt great relief and thanked the staff.
